title: Tiruppur knitwear cluster pushes for stable government, fears order delays
summary: Exporters in the Tiruppur knitwear cluster have written to the Governor urging quick formation of a stable government, warning that prolonged uncertainty could push EU buyers to reroute orders.

title: TVK Tiruppur MLAs camp at party HQ ahead of Governor's call
summary: Newly elected TVK MLAs from Tiruppur have shifted to Chennai and are camping at the party headquarters as they await the Governor's invitation on government formation.

title: Tiruppur garment exports to US rebound 11% in April
summary: Tiruppur garment exports to the United States rose about 11 percent in April year-on-year, helped by a softer rupee and pre-monsoon shipment push, exporters' bodies confirmed.

title: Tiruppur garment workers want ₹1,000 scheme linked to wages
summary: Garment-worker unions in Tiruppur have demanded that the women's monthly ₹1,000 transfer be retained as a top-up rather than offset against minimum wages.

title: Avinashi toll plaza ramps up FASTag readers ahead of new rules
summary: The Avinashi toll plaza has added two more FASTag readers and revised signage ahead of the rollout of the stricter NHAI matching rules.
